itir-statibaker-kanboard-completion-supe.claim: Supermanager monitor for the live Kanboard completion wave. Governance promotion is intentionally held until implementation/data manager lanes report.

statibaker-kanboard-bootstrap-manager.claim: Manager lane 1: bootstrap/verify Kanboard project, columns, swimlane assumptions, and local column-map artifact. Workers are optional only for independent sidecars with disjoint write sets.

statibaker-kanboard-live-sync-manager.claim: Manager lane 2: implement explicit one-way --apply sync from local runsheet JSON to Kanboard JSON-RPC. Workers are optional only for independent sidecars with disjoint write sets.

statibaker-kanboard-idempotency-manager.claim: Manager lane 3: prove repeated syncs are stable and local state is not corrupted by Kanboard failures. Workers are optional only for independent sidecars with disjoint write sets.

statibaker-kanboard-report-dashboard-man.claim: Manager lane 4: expose sync outcome as a read-only StatiBaker artifact and query/dashboard surface. Workers are optional only for independent sidecars with disjoint write sets.

statibaker-sensiblaw-bridge-source-manag.claim: Manager lane 5: ensure SensibLaw task memory/timeline bridge artifacts feed the same Kanboard plan/sync shape. Workers are optional only for independent sidecars with disjoint write sets.
